en: So, do you recognize any of these men?
ko: 이 사람들 중 아는 사람이 있나요?

en: I was hiding in the bathroom stall,
so I didn't see his face, but I heard him.
He was singing along to the music at the bar. Do you remember what he was singing?
ko: 바에서 음악에 맞춰 노래를 부르고 있었어요. 무슨 노래를 불렀는지 기억하세요?

en: I think it was that song, I Want It That Way.
ko: "I Want It That Way"라는 노래였던 것 같아요.

en: Number one, could you please sing the opening to I Want It That Way?
ko: 1번, "I Want It That Way"의 시작 부분을 불러주시겠어요?

en: You are my fire. Number two, keep it going.
Believe when I say. Number four.
I want it that way. Tell me why.
Ain't nothing but a heartache. Tell me why.
ko: 그건 그저 가슴 아픈 일일 뿐. 말해줘 왜.

en: I never want to hear you say. Woo!
ko: 네가 이렇게 말하는 걸 절대 듣고 싶지 않아.

en: I want it that way. Ah, chills. Literal chills.
ko: 나는 그렇게 원해! 아, 소름. 진짜 소름 돋는다.
5번이었어요. 5번이 제 형을 죽였어요. 맙소사, 그 부분을 깜빡했네.
